all.en: This message is a friendly reminder regarding outstanding invoices.
all.zh: 本訊息為友善提醒您仍有未結清之發票。

all.en: Our standard payment terms are net thirty from the invoice date.
all.zh: 本公司標準付款條件為發票日後三十天淨付款。

all.en: Several invoices on your account are approaching the due date.
all.zh: 您帳戶上有數張發票即將屆滿付款期。

all.en: Invoice number A four five six two is due on Friday next week.
all.zh: 發票編號A四五六二將於下週五到期。

all.en: The outstanding balance currently totals eighteen thousand dollars.
all.zh: 目前未結清餘額合計為一萬八千美元。

all.en: Please confirm receipt of all listed invoices at your earliest convenience.
all.zh: 請於方便時儘速確認已收到所列各筆發票。

all.en: Wire transfer remains our preferred method for payment settlement.
all.zh: 電匯仍為本公司偏好的結帳方式。

all.en: Bank routing details are included in the footer of each invoice.
all.zh: 銀行匯款資訊載於每張發票之頁尾。

all.en: Please reference the invoice number when initiating any transfer.
all.zh: 進行匯款時請務必註記對應之發票編號。

all.en: Credit card payments are accepted but subject to a processing fee.
all.zh: 亦可使用信用卡付款，惟須加收處理手續費。

all.en: Late payments accrue interest at one point five percent monthly.
all.zh: 逾期款項將以月息百分之一點五計息。

all.en: Accounts past sixty days may be referred to collections review.
all.zh: 逾期超過六十天之帳戶可能轉交催收程序審核。

all.en: Repeated delays may impact your future credit terms with us.
all.zh: 多次延遲可能影響日後與本公司之信用額度條件。

all.en: If you anticipate any delay, please contact us in advance.
all.zh: 若預期將有延遲，請事先與我們聯繫。

all.en: We can discuss installment plans for unexpected cash flow issues.
all.zh: 如遇突發資金狀況可商議分期付款方案。

all.en: Statement copies can be resent upon request from your team.
all.zh: 如您團隊有需要可再次寄送對帳單副本。

all.en: Dispute resolution should be raised within seven days of invoice receipt.
all.zh: 如有爭議應於收到發票後七天內提出。

all.en: Please direct billing questions to the accounts receivable team.
all.zh: 帳務疑問請洽應收帳款團隊。

all.en: Online payment portal access remains available around the clock.
all.zh: 線上付款入口全天候開放使用。

all.en: Your prompt attention helps us maintain a smooth working relationship.
all.zh: 您及時的回應有助於維持順暢的合作關係。

all.en: Thank you for your continued partnership and timely cooperation.
all.zh: 感謝您長期合作以及及時的配合。

all.en: We look forward to receiving payment confirmation soon.
all.zh: 我們期待儘快收到您的付款確認。

all.en: Our finance team is available Monday through Friday during regular office hours.
all.zh: 本公司財務團隊週一至週五辦公時間皆可受理諮詢。

all.en: Early payments before the due date qualify for a two percent discount.
all.zh: 於到期日前提早付款可享百分之二折扣優惠。

all.en: Annual reconciliation statements will be issued at the end of each fiscal year.
all.zh: 年度對帳單將於每會計年度結束時寄發。

all.en: New customers should establish credit references before placing large orders.
all.zh: 新客戶應於大額訂購前提供信用備查資料。

all.en: Tax exempt organizations must provide certificates before invoices are issued.
all.zh: 免稅機構須於開立發票前提供相關證明文件。

all.en: Foreign currency invoices use the exchange rate locked at order confirmation.
all.zh: 外幣發票採訂單確認時鎖定之匯率計算。

all.en: Electronic invoice delivery saves both parties time and reduces administrative overhead.
all.zh: 電子發票寄送可為雙方節省時間並降低行政負擔。

all.en: Please update our records if your billing contact information has recently changed.
all.zh: 若貴公司帳務聯絡資訊近期有異動，請通知我們更新紀錄。

all.en: Year end statements will be sent during the first week of January.
all.zh: 年終對帳單將於一月第一週寄出。

all.en: We appreciate your business and remain committed to providing excellent service.
all.zh: 感謝您的支持，我們將持續致力提供優質服務。

all.en: Automated reminders are sent five days before each invoice reaches its due date.
all.zh: 自動提醒於每張發票到期日前五天寄發。

all.en: Payment confirmation emails include a transaction reference number for your records.
all.zh: 付款確認電子郵件包含交易參考編號供您留存。

all.en: Volume discounts may apply to customers who consistently pay invoices ahead of schedule.
all.zh: 持續提前付款之客戶可能適用大量折扣優惠。

all.en: Statement of account documents reflect all activity over the last twelve months.
all.zh: 對帳單文件顯示過去十二個月內之所有往來活動。

all.en: Credit notes for returned merchandise are typically issued within five business days.
all.zh: 退貨之折讓單通常於五個營業日內開立。

all.en: Our online payment portal accepts ACH transfers from all major United States banks.
all.zh: 本公司線上付款入口接受美國各大主要銀行之ACH轉帳。

all.en: International wires may take up to three business days to fully clear our account.
all.zh: 國際電匯入帳本公司帳戶可能需要最多三個營業日。

all.en: Please notify us immediately if you suspect any fraudulent charges on your invoices.
all.zh: 如懷疑發票上有任何詐欺款項請立即通知本公司。

all.en: Account managers are available to discuss customized payment arrangements upon written request.
all.zh: 帳戶經理可依書面申請討論客製化付款安排。

all.en: We value transparent communication and will keep you informed of any policy changes.
all.zh: 我們重視透明溝通，將隨時通知您任何政策變動。

all.en: Honestly, I always set a calendar reminder two days before each invoice due date so nothing slips by me.
all.zh: 老實說每張發票到期前兩天我都會設行事曆提醒，這樣才不會漏掉。

all.en: My accounting friend told me to always pay invoices early when the two percent discount is available.
all.zh: 我做會計的朋友建議只要有百分之二折扣可拿，就一定要提早付款。

all.en: Don't ignore those automated reminder emails, they might look annoying but they really do save you money.
all.zh: 別忽略那些自動提醒信，看起來煩人但真的能幫你省錢。

all.en: I once disputed a charge from a vendor and the resolution came back within four business days.
all.zh: 我曾經對一家廠商的款項提出爭議，四個營業日內就獲得了解決。

all.en: Honestly, switching to electronic invoices cut my month end paperwork in half almost overnight.
all.zh: 老實說改用電子發票後，我月底要處理的紙本作業幾乎一夕間少了一半。

all.en: Be sure to update the billing contact whenever someone leaves your team, otherwise reminders go nowhere.
all.zh: 團隊有人離職時記得更新帳務聯絡人，不然提醒會寄到沒人看的信箱。

all.en: My finance buddy says the friendly tone of these reminders helps preserve long term business relationships.
all.zh: 我財務的朋友說這種提醒信用語親切點，比較能維持長期業務關係。

all.en: Don't wait until day sixty to call your account manager, just send a quick message at day forty five.
all.zh: 別等到第六十天才打給帳戶經理，第四十五天就先傳個訊息問一下。

all.en: Honestly, I appreciate when vendors call me to talk through cash flow issues instead of just going silent.
all.zh: 老實說廠商主動打電話聊現金流問題比一聲不吭好多了。

all.en: The online portal is honestly so much easier than wiring funds through my bank branch in person.
all.zh: 老實說線上付款入口比親自跑分行匯款方便太多了。
